title: alnus firma
intro: Alnus firma, also known as Japanese green alder, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to Japan. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The plant's extracts have been traditionally used to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as to reduce fever and alleviate pain. Herbal preparations of Alnus firma, including teas and infusions, are commonly used to promote respiratory health and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu.
